channel.title: IE ESC on Remko's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in IE ESC on Remko's Blog

item.title: How to deactivate Internet Explorer Enhanced Security Configuration in Windows Server 2008?
item.description: Open Server Manager and in the Security Information tab click Configure IE ESC. An improvement in Server 2008 is that you can disable it for Administators but enable it for Normal Users, this is nice for Terminal Server and Citrix environments.
